# Documentation

The project uses **Sphinx** with **MyST** (Markdown) and the **PyData theme**. Most content is hand-authored Markdown; feature reference pages and library API pages are auto-generated from source metadata and code annotations at build time.

::::{grid} 1
:gutter: 3

:::{grid-item-card} Quickstart Guide
:class-title: sd-text-center
:link: docs/quickstart
:link-type: doc

How to build the docs locally, where content lives, and how to write feature notes and library annotations.
:::

::::

## Auto-Generated Sections

Two sections of the docs site are fully auto-generated and git-ignored. **Never edit files inside these directories directly:**

| Directory | Source | Generated by |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| `docs/source/features/` | `features/*/metadata.yaml` + `features/*/notes.md` | `just build-docs` (via `proman-gen-docs-data`) |
| `docs/source/library/` | `lib/*.bash` + `lib/*.sh` (structured `@brief` comments) | `just build-docs` (via `proman-gen-docs-data`) |

To update feature documentation, edit the feature's `metadata.yaml` or `notes.md`. To update library documentation, edit the `@brief` annotations in the relevant `lib/*.bash` or `lib/*.sh` file. See {doc}`docs/quickstart` for details on how to write these annotations.

## Hand-Authored Sections

All other content under `docs/source/` is hand-authored:

| Section | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `docs/source/intro.md` + `background/` | Project introduction, conceptual background |
| `docs/source/user-guide/` | Installation, options, versioning, technical details |
| `docs/source/dev-guide/` | This developer guide |
